description_long: This is a compact, four-door white electric car with a modern, aerodynamic design and black-tinted windows. The vehicle features a green 'MiEV' decal with an electric plug motif along the lower side panels, indicating its eco-friendly nature. The car is shown connected to a blue and white charging station via a cable plugged into the rear left quarter panel. The front of the car displays a Mitsubishi emblem above a white license plate labeled 'EVERMOTION.' The rear view reveals a large rear window, subtle taillights, and the same 'EVERMOTION' plate. The wheels are standard, multi-spoke alloys, and the overall build suggests a lightweight, urban-friendly electric vehicle.
description: A compact white electric car with black windows, green 'MiEV' decals, and a charging cable connected to its rear left side. Features Mitsubishi branding and a modern, urban design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full 'MiEV' decal, four doors, and the car's compact, streamlined profile.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large rear window, taillights, 'EVERMOTION' license plate, and charging cable plugged into the left rear quarter.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the charging station and cable clearly visible, as well as the 'MiEV' decal and door outlines.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the Mitsubishi emblem, 'EVERMOTION' license plate, and the charging station positioned to the left.
attribute_license_plate_design: White rectangular plate with black uppercase text 'EVERMOTION', no regional symbols or identifiers.
attribute_badging_or_emblem: Mitsubishi three-diamond logo on the front hood
'MiEV' green decal on both side panels
